creator: pfg@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 179059
Update tfel to version 2.0.4

Version 2.0.4 has been released the 22/09/2016.

This is mainly a bug-fix release after version 2.0.3.


      Improvements

  * Improved MTest python bindings: new wrapped
    methods |setStrain|, |setDeformationGradient|,|setOpeningDisplacement|, |setStress|, |setCohesiveForce|, |setStrainEpsilon|,
    etc.). See also Ticket #32 <https://sourceforge.net/p/tfel/tickets/32/>;.
  * New entries in glossary: |Emissivity| and |HeatTransfertCoefficient|
  * Better support for the clang compiler.
  * in |TFEL/Math|, add the |t2tot2::transpose_derivative| method which
    compute the derivative of the transpose of a tensor with respect to
    this tensor.
  * in |MFront|, the keyword |@DSL| is now on alias for |@Parser|
  * in |MTest|, the rotation matrix relating the reference frame to the
    material frame can now be defined using either the Euler angles or
    the Miller indices:

Example: |@RotationMatrix<Miller> {1,5,9};|
